changeSet.author: Kushboo

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from privilege where privilege='Create Teleconsultation'

changeSet.comment: Adding privilege for creating Teleconsultation Link
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO privilege (privilege, description, uuid) VALUES ('Create Teleconsultation', 'Able to create Teleconsultation Link in Teleconsultation module', uuid());

changeSet.author: sihsalus

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property = 'bahmni.appointment.teleConsultation.serverUrlPattern'

changeSet.comment: Add global property declared in the legacy teleconsultation config.xml
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO global_property (property, property_value, description, uuid) VALUES ( 'bahmni.appointment.teleConsultation.serverUrlPattern', 'https://meet.jit.si/{0}', 'Pattern of the URL for the meeting server. Notice the placeholder {0} for appointment UUID', uuid() );
